quick_takeaways: Lockdown has the highest dead-space median (96.89%).
Lockdown has the highest storm-affected match rate (9.9%).
Lockdown has the lowest loot yield (12.0 loot per human).
GrandRift has the highest outlier concentration (10.2% of matches flagged).
Flagged 58 outlier matches out of 796 total matches (7.3%).

top_outliers.improve: Pull early objectives inward or add encounter hooks to trigger engagement sooner.
